message:
Fix syncChat pagination: paginate backward from newest, stop at lastSortKey

The Beeper API returns messages in descending order regardless of the
direction parameter. Using direction=after caused the cursor to walk
backward through overlapping result pages, creating an infinite loop
that re-wrote all messages every poll cycle. For the vibez WhatsApp
chat, this produced 527K lines (228 unique messages x 2315 duplicates).

Fix: paginate from newest using direction=before (which correctly
advances to older pages), stopping when we reach lastSortKey.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
